transcript: Speaker A: ಇನ್ಮೇಲಿಂದ ಈ ಪದಗಳನ್ನ ಬಳಸಬೇಡಿ. I am fine, thank you. I don't know. You are welcome. ಇದು ತುಂಬಾ ಬೇಸಿಕ್ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್. ನಾನು ಕೂಡ ಮೊದಲು ಹೀಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೆ. ನಂತರ ಮೈಸಿವಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ದೆ. [From now on, don't use these words. I am fine, thank you. I don't know. You are welcome. This is very basic English. I also used to speak English like this before. Then I started practicing on MySivi.] Speaker B: Hello, what is your name? Speaker A: My name is Neha. Speaker B: How old are you? Speaker A: I have 22. Speaker B: I have 22 ಅಲ್ಲ. I am 22 years old ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Not 'I have 22'. You should say 'I am 22 years old'.] Speaker A: Okay, okay. I am 22 years old. Speaker B: Where are you from? Speaker A: I am Karnataka. Speaker B: I am Karnataka ಅಲ್ಲ. I am from Karnataka ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Not 'I am Karnataka'. You should say 'I am from Karnataka'.] Speaker A: Ohh... okay okay. ನನಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಬರೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [Oh... okay okay. I don't know English very well.] Speaker B: ಏನು problem ಇಲ್ಲ. AI teacher ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡ್ತೀಯಾ? [No problem. Will you try an AI teacher?] Speaker A: ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ costly ಇರುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ? [That will be very costly, right?] Speaker B: ಅಯ್ಯೋ ಇಲ್ಲ. ನಾರ್ಮಲ್ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕ್ಲಾಸಸ್ ಗಿಂತ 7x cheaper ಇದೆ. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ ಮೈಸಿವಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [Oh no. It is 7x cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing on MySivi.] Speaker A: ಆದ್ರೆ time ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ. [But I don't get time.] Speaker B: ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಜಸ್ಟ್ 15-20 minutes ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಸಾಕು. ನೀನು ಫುಲ್ ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಆಗ್ತೀಯಾ. [Just 15-20 minutes of practice a day is enough. You will become fully confident.] Speaker A: Wow! ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Wow! How to join?] Speaker B: ಈ install ಬಟನ್ ಕ್ಲಿಕ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಮೈಸಿವಿ ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ. [Click this install button and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: ಇನ್ಮೇಲಿಂದ ಈ ಪದಗಳನ್ನ ಬಳಸಬೇಡಿ [Don't use these words from now on] I am fine, thank you ❌ I don't know ❌ You are welcome ❌ I have 22 ❌ I am 22 years old ✔️ I am Karnataka ❌ I am from Karnataka ✔️ ನನಗೆ English ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಬರೋದಿಲ್ಲ [I don't know English well] ಏನು problem ಇಲ್ಲ [No problem] ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ costly ಇರುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ [It will be very costly, right?] classes ಗಿಂತ 7x Cheaper [7x Cheaper than classes] ಅದಕ್ಕೇ [That's why] ಆದ್ರೆ time ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ [But no time] 15-20 minutes ನೀನು full confident ಆಗೀಯಾ [You will become fully confident] ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು [How to join] MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A presenter demonstrates how she improved her basic English using the MySivi app. She interacts with an AI avatar that corrects her grammatical mistakes in real-time. The ad highlights that the app is 7x cheaper than traditional classes and requires only 15-20 minutes of daily practice, ending with a call to action to install the app.
